steps.title: Add the five values
steps.content: Sum the masses: $3810,3810,3530,3850,3550$, giving a total of $18550$.

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content: The mean is $$\tfrac{18550}{5}=3710.$$ The answer is 3710.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $3710$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $3710$.
